headline: Developer experience engineer focused on authentication, TypeScript, AI-assisted development, and developer tooling.
title: Developer Experience Engineer
confidenceNote: Personal site, GitHub profile, LinkedIn, and WorkOS-authored content consistently identify Nick Nisi as a WorkOS developer experience engineer with TypeScript, DX, and AI/evals interests.
bioMarkdown: Developer experience engineer at WorkOS helping developers build with authentication and modern web tooling. Nick is a long-time TypeScript advocate, conference organizer, streamer, and technical writer with recent work around AI-assisted development and practical LLM eval workflows.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: Personal homepage lists WorkOS developer experience role, TypeScript focus, talks, and DX writing.

primary.note: Profile states he is a Developer Experience Engineer at WorkOS building tools, docs, and authentication experiences.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
primary.note: Lists WorkOS and Developer and Agent Experiences role.

secondary.label: WorkOS blog author page/article
secondary.note: WorkOS republishes Nick's evals article, reinforcing AI/evaluation interests.

headline: Oregon's first Chief Privacy Officer and AI Strategist, shaping statewide privacy, data protection, and AI governance.

confidenceNote: Official Oregon newsroom announcement and multiple government-technology/local-news sources consistently identify Nik Blosser as Oregon's Chief Privacy Officer and AI Strategist.
bioMarkdown: Oregon's first Chief Privacy Officer and AI Strategist, responsible for shaping state strategy around privacy, data protection, and AI. Nik is a useful match for public-sector AI governance, privacy programs, and responsible AI adoption in government.

headline: Founder of Evalyn, applying AI to audit customer-service conversations; also an author and educator in data analysis and prompt engineering.
title: Founder
confidenceNote: USF and Golden Gate University sources directly connect Nikita Tkachenko to Evalyn.ai; arXiv and Springer/Apress sources support his research, San Francisco location, and data-analysis author profile.
bioMarkdown: Founder of Evalyn, an AI company focused on auditing customer-service conversations. Nikita also teaches prompt engineering, conducts research, and authored *Data Insight Foundations: Step-by-Step Data Analysis with R* through Apress.

primary.note: States Nikita Tkachenko runs Evalyn, which uses AI to audit customer-service conversations, and teaches prompt engineering.
